# n-dx

> Codebase analysis generated by Sourcevision

## Project Overview

- **Files**: 221
- **Lines of code**: 29,554
- **Languages**: TypeScript (165), JSON (21), CSS (14), Other (8), Markdown (6)
- **Analyzed**: 2026-02-03T19:09:40.257Z

## Architecture Zones

### CLI Command Layer (`hench-cli`)

The hench command-line interface including the entry dispatcher and commands for run, status, show, and init.

- Files: 5
- Cohesion: 0.67, Coupling: 0.33
- Entry points: packages/hench/src/cli/commands/constants.ts

### Agent Core and Schema (`hench-core`)

Central agent logic (loop, brief, prompt), schema definitions, and persistence store that form the backbone of the Hench autonomous task runner.

- Files: 19
- Cohesion: 0.83, Coupling: 0.17
- Entry points: packages/hench/src/agent/cli-loop.ts, packages/hench/src/agent/loop.ts, packages/hench/src/cli/commands/init.ts, packages/hench/src/schema/index.ts, packages/hench/src/schema/v1.ts (+2 more)

### Tools and Guard Rails (`hench-tools-and-guard`)

Tool implementations (file, shell, git, rex) and the security guard layer (path validation, command allowlisting) that constrain agent behavior.

- Files: 12
- Cohesion: 0.86, Coupling: 0.14
- Entry points: packages/hench/src/agent/tools.ts, packages/hench/src/guard/index.ts

### Rex Task Engine (`rex-task-engine`)

Self-contained PRD management system with hierarchical task modeling, DAG validation, priority scheduling, project scanning, and an MCP server for AI agent integration.

- Files: 36
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00

### Sourcevision Analysis Pipeline (`sourcevision-analysis`)

Core analysis engine with 4-phase pipeline (inventory, imports, zones, components), AI enrichment via Claude, schema validation, and supplementary output generation.

- Files: 42
- Cohesion: 0.96, Coupling: 0.04
- Entry points: packages/sourcevision/src/analyzers/next-steps.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/schema/data-files.ts, packages/sourcevision/src/schema/validate.ts

### SourceVision Test Fixture (`sourcevision-test-fixture`)

A self-contained minimal TypeScript project (7 files, ~56 LOC) used as an analyzer test fixture, featuring realistic layering (models, services, utilities) and intentional dead-code patterns for validation.

- Files: 7
- Cohesion: 1.00, Coupling: 0.00

### SourceVision Viewer (`sourcevision-viewer`)

Preact-based interactive UI for exploring code analysis results, including the v1 schema definition, data loading layer, reusable components, and seven visualization views (overview, graph, zones, files, routes, architecture, problems).

- Files: 49
- Cohesion: 0.96, Coupling: 0.04
- Entry points: packages/sourcevision/src/schema/v1.ts

### Most-Imported Files

- `packages/rex/src/core/tree.ts` (9 imports)
- `packages/sourcevision/src/analyzers/inventory.ts` (9 imports)

- `vitest` (used by 48 files)
- `preact` (used by 23 files)
- `rex` (used by 7 files)
- `zod` (used by 5 files)
- `typescript` (used by 3 files)
- `@anthropic-ai/sdk` (used by 2 files)
- `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` (used by 2 files)
- `esbuild` (used by 1 files)

## Route Structure

### Route Tree

```
/ → packages/sourcevision/tests/fixtures/remix-app/app/routes/_index.tsx
/users/:id → packages/sourcevision/tests/fixtures/remix-app/app/routes/users.$id.tsx
```

### Convention Exports

- action: 2 modules
- default: 4 modules
- loader: 2 modules
- meta: 1 modules

### Components: 5 total, 0 usage edges

## Findings

### Observations

- Bidirectional coupling: "hench-cli" ↔ "hench-core" (6+1 crossings) — consider extracting shared interface [warning]
- Bidirectional coupling: "hench-core" ↔ "hench-tools-and-guard" (3+4 crossings) — consider extracting shared interface [warning]
- Bidirectional coupling: "sourcevision-analysis" ↔ "sourcevision-viewer" (3+4 crossings) — consider extracting shared interface [warning]
- Size imbalance: largest zone has 49 files vs smallest with 5 — uneven decomposition [info]
- High cohesion (0.83) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (hench-core)
- High cohesion (0.86) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (hench-tools-and-guard)
- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (rex-task-engine)
- High cohesion (0.96) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (sourcevision-analysis)
- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (sourcevision-test-fixture)
- High cohesion (0.96) — files are tightly interconnected [info] (sourcevision-viewer)
- ... and 27 more
